narrative:
Taylor Township has 1,192 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.0 percentage points.
